# Vike documentation header for AI

> @AI — **CRITICAL FOR AI AGENTS** for proficiently using Vike's docs:
> - READ THIS ENTIRE FILE - don't stop at the top
> - These are connection points, NOT actual documentation
> - SERIOUSLY CONSIDER fetching URLs below when you identify matches
> - SERIOUSLY CONSIDER fetching URLs below based on user prompts
> - Vike's docs lives at https://github.com/vikejs/vike/tree/main/docs — SERIOUSLY CONSIDER searching inside the entire docs

Vike is a Vite-based framework for SSR, SSG, and SPA — flexible/unopinionated core extended by `vike-react` / `vike-vue` / `vike-solid`. Pages below are at `https://vike.dev<path>`.

# Core mental model

## Config files - https://vike.dev/config
`+` config files, how Vike is configured, dir-based inheritance, defaults, cumulative configs, `.clear.js` / `.default.js`, global vs page config, pointer imports vs runtime code (config code isn't runtime code), groups

## https://vike.dev/pageContext
per-request/per-page state object, built-in props (urlParsed, urlPathname, routeParams, data, headers, isHydration, isBackwardNavigation, isClientSide), custom props, access in hooks and via usePageContext(), passToClient, can-I-mutate, TypeScript narrowing, lifecycle, server vs client

## https://vike.dev/globalContext
app-wide shared state (e.g. nav menu URL list), built-in & custom props, one per environment (server process / browser session), getGlobalContext(), pageContext.globalContext, lifecycle, TypeScript

## Custom settings & hooks - https://vike.dev/meta
the `+meta` setting: create your own settings & hooks, change a hook's environment (server/client), examples (+sql, +title, +Layout, modify +data env); advanced

## Built-in hooks list - https://vike.dev/hooks
index of all hooks with their environment (server/client/configurable): data, guard, onBeforeRender, onRenderHtml, onRenderClient, onHydrationEnd, transition/error/prerender lifecycle hooks; pointer to create-your-own

## Built-in settings list - https://vike.dev/settings
index of all settings, HTML shell settings, pointer to create custom settings

# Getting started

## Get started - https://vike.dev/start
quick start & overview, pick a UI framework (React/Vue/Solid) and SSR/SSG/SPA, pointers to scaffold a new app or add Vike to an existing Vite app

## Scaffold new Vike app - https://vike.dev/new
create-vike CLI, scaffold projects (with `vike-react`/`vike-vue`/`vike-solid` or core-only), requirements (Node/Deno/Bun)

## Add SSR/SSG to existing Vite app - https://vike.dev/add
migrate a plain Vite app to Vike step-by-step, vite-to-vike examples (React/Vue)

## Extensions overview - https://vike.dev/extensions
`vike-react`/`vike-vue`/`vike-solid` (+ Svelte/Angular/server), what extensions do, extension vs manual integration

# Routing

## Routing overview - https://vike.dev/routing
Filesystem Routing, parameterized routes (`@id`), route groups, `src/`, Route String vs Route Function, route guards, React Router / Vue Router interop

## https://vike.dev/filesystem-routing
URL derived from file location, ignored dirs (`src/`, `index/`, `pages/`, `renderer/`), config inheritance, case sensitivity, crawling

## https://vike.dev/route-string
Route String syntax in `+route.js`, params (`@id` → routeParams), globs, catch-all (`*`), precedence, escaping `@`

## https://vike.dev/route-function
programmatic routing, `resolveRoute()`, async, redirection, accessing routeParams, when to use vs guard()

## https://vike.dev/routing-precedence
resolving route conflicts, specificity ordering (most → least specific) when multiple routes match a URL

## +route setting - https://vike.dev/route
point a page to its Route String or Route Function

## Base URL - https://vike.dev/base-url
serve site under a subpath, `base` / `baseAssets` / `baseServer`, Vite `base`, `import.meta.env.BASE_URL`, Base-URL-aware `<Link>`

## Active links - https://vike.dev/active-links
highlight the current page in navigation, custom `<Link>` using pageContext.urlPathname

# Data fetching & state

## Data fetching overview - https://vike.dev/data-fetching
recommendations, initial data via `+data`/useData(), mutations & subsequent data (pagination) via RPC Telefunc/tRPC or TanStack Query, API routes, GraphQL, SSG data, global data, state management

## +data() hook - https://vike.dev/data
fetch a page's initial data, runs server-side by default (use ORM/SQL directly), configurable env (`.client.js`/`.shared.js`), error handling, paired with useData()

## https://vike.dev/useData
component hook to access the value returned by `+data`, typed; alternative pageContext.data

## https://vike.dev/usePageContext
access pageContext from any UI component, React Context / Vue provide-inject, implement without an extension

## +onBeforeRender() hook - https://vike.dev/onBeforeRender
advanced/low-level data hook, when to use vs data(), deep integration with data tools, `+meta` to change env, override

## State management - https://vike.dev/store
integrate stores (Redux, Pinia, Vuex, Zustand, ...), SSR state serialization/hydration, manual integration via +onCreatePageContext / +Wrapper

## GraphQL - https://vike.dev/graphql
manual GraphQL integration via hooks, Apollo / Relay / urql

## API routes - https://vike.dev/api-routes
Vike has no built-in API routes by design, prefer RPC (Telefunc) or `+server`, when API routes still make sense

# Render control (SSR / SSG / SPA / streaming)

## SSR vs SPA - https://vike.dev/SSR-vs-SPA
choose per page, what each renders, hydration, combine with pre-rendering

## https://vike.dev/pre-rendering
pre-rendering aka SSG (render HTML at build time, `vike build`), deploy to static host, parameterized-route URLs, partial / opt-in / opt-out, dynamic condition, SSG vs SSR, SSG+SPA, SSG+SSR

## +ssr setting - https://vike.dev/ssr
enable/disable SSR globally or per page (boolean)

## +stream setting - https://vike.dev/stream
enable/disable HTML streaming, `'web'`|`'node'`, inheritance

## +prerender setting - https://vike.dev/prerender
config knobs: partial, redirects, noExtraDir, parallel, disableAutoRun, enable, keepDistServer (the guide is /pre-rendering)

## +clientRouting setting - https://vike.dev/clientRouting
Client Routing vs Server Routing, link interception, hooks, programmatic nav, state initialization, link-level settings (keep-scroll-position)

## <head> tags overview - https://vike.dev/head-tags
set document metadata via title/description/image/viewport settings or `+Head`, per-page vs global, data-driven head, i18n, markdown

## +Head setting - https://vike.dev/Head
add `<head>` tags (cumulative), inject `<script>`, raw HTML, only-HTML, vs the `<Head>` component (useConfig)

## +Page setting - https://vike.dev/Page
the page's root component (JSX/Vue), behavior set by UI-framework extension, manual integration

## +Layout setting - https://vike.dev/Layout
shared layout (header/sidebar/footer), multiple & nested layouts, layout data fetching, cumulative

## +Wrapper setting - https://vike.dev/Wrapper
wraps Page and all Layouts, used for tool integration (data fetching, state mgmt), cumulative, vs Layout

## Error page - https://vike.dev/error-page
`/pages/_error/+Page.js`, rendered on errors and `throw render(abortStatusCode)`, abortReason, pre-rendering

# Lifecycle hooks

## +guard() hook - https://vike.dev/guard
protect pages from unauthorized access, async, applies to one/many pages, used with `throw render()`/`throw redirect()`, `.server`/`.client` env

## +onHydrationEnd() hook - https://vike.dev/onHydrationEnd
run code after hydration completes, requires Client Routing

## +onError() hook - https://vike.dev/onError
server-side error handler, cumulative/global, error tracking

## +onHookCall() hook - https://vike.dev/onHookCall
called on every Vike hook execution, instrumentation (Sentry/OpenTelemetry), logging (beta)

## +onPageTransitionStart() hook - https://vike.dev/onPageTransitionStart
page transition animations (with onPageTransitionEnd), requires Client Routing

## +onCreatePageContext() hook - https://vike.dev/onCreatePageContext
runs when pageContext is created (right after routing), init / computed props / store, `.server`/`.client`

## +onCreateGlobalContext() hook - https://vike.dev/onCreateGlobalContext
runs when globalContext is created, init / global data / auth / store

## +onBeforePrerenderStart() hook - https://vike.dev/onBeforePrerenderStart
provide URL list for parameterized pre-rendered routes, bulk data fetching, build-time only

## +onPrerenderStart() hook - https://vike.dev/onPrerenderStart
add/remove/modify the list of pageContext objects before pre-rendering, i18n

# Control flow & utility functions

## throw redirect() - https://vike.dev/redirect
abort rendering and redirect (302 default, 301 permanent), auth flows, vs navigate() (after render) and throw render()

## throw render() - https://vike.dev/render
abort and render the error page or another URL while preserving the URL, status codes 401/403/404, abortReason, vs throw redirect()

## navigate() - https://vike.dev/navigate
programmatic client-side navigation (e.g. after form submit), options, history.pushState, vs throw redirect()

## reload() - https://vike.dev/reload
fast page reload via Client Router (vs window.location.reload), refresh on auth-cookie change

## prefetch() - https://vike.dev/prefetch
programmatically prefetch a page, requires Client Routing

## renderPage() - https://vike.dev/renderPage
manually embed Vike into any server (SSR), vs `+server.js`

## escapeInject - https://vike.dev/escapeInject
template tag to sanitize HTML (XSS) in onRenderHtml, HTML fragments, dangerouslySkipEscape

## injectFilter() - https://vike.dev/injectFilter
control where/what tags Vike injects (notably preload tags), vs injectScriptsAt

## useConfig() - https://vike.dev/useConfig
set settings (title/description/Head) from inside hooks and UI components, `<Config>`/`<Head>`, streaming, bots, call before `await`

## useHydrated() - https://vike.dev/useHydrated
whether the page is hydrated (false on server/first render), disable interactive elements until hydrated, triggers re-render

## getGlobalContext() - https://vike.dev/getGlobalContext
access globalContext anytime (e.g. at server start, before requests), assets manifest, async/sync variants

## <ClientOnly> - https://vike.dev/ClientOnly
render a component only client-side with an SSR fallback (React/Vue/Solid)

## modifyUrl() - https://vike.dev/modifyUrl
manipulate URLs, typically to extract the locale (i18n)

# Integrations & guides

## Authentication - https://vike.dev/auth
any auth tool (Better Auth / Auth.js / Passport / Grant), pageContext.user, login flow, SSG, redirect & guard

## Internationalization (i18n) - https://vike.dev/i18n
locale extraction via onBeforeRoute(), localized `<Link>`, pre-rendering locales, `lang`, split locale data, modifyUrl

## Environment variables - https://vike.dev/env
`.env` files, `PUBLIC_ENV__` prefix to expose to client, secrets warning, static replacement, TypeScript, public allowlist

## HTTP request headers - https://vike.dev/headers
pageContext.headers (Vike-normalized) and pageContext.headersOriginal (response headers → /headersResponse)

## File environment - https://vike.dev/file-env
`.server.js`/`.client.js` guarantee a file's env; for `+` files `.server`/`.client`/`.shared`/`.ssr.js` modify env

## Path aliases - https://vike.dev/path-aliases
avoid relative imports, define in vite.config (resolve.alias) + tsconfig paths + package.json `#imports`

## Preloading - https://vike.dev/preloading
asset preloading & early hints, automatic `<script>`/`<link>` injection, assets manifest, injectFilter()

## Static directory (public/) - https://vike.dev/static-directory
serve static assets from `public/` (e.g. robots.txt), `dist/client/`, server static middleware

## Markdown - https://vike.dev/markdown
MDX/Markdown Vite plugins (Vue & React), frontmatter, global & page metadata, custom (eager) setting

## CSS-in-JS - https://vike.dev/css-in-js
collect styles during SSR to avoid FOUC, styled-components / Emotion / etc, onBeforeRenderHtml, without an extension

## Error tracking - https://vike.dev/error-tracking
client-side via `+client.js`, server-side via `+onError()`, Sentry & co

## Common issues - https://vike.dev/common-issues
broken npm packages (ssr.noExternal), hydration mismatch

## +client.js - https://vike.dev/client
add client-side JS (error/user tracking, cookie consent, CSS frameworks), runs first, not re-run on client-side navigation

## +server - https://vike.dev/server
integrate a server framework (Hono/Express/...) via `+server.js`, or `+server: true` built-in server, deployment, self-host, pageContext.runtime, standalone, HMR, compression

## Integration guide - https://vike.dev/integration
vanilla UI tools, analytics, component libraries, data fetching, service worker, view transitions, manual server integration, non-JavaScript backend

## CLI - https://vike.dev/cli
`vike dev`/`build`/`preview`/`prerender`, CLI options, `VIKE_CONFIG`/`VITE_CONFIG` env, JSON5

## JavaScript API - https://vike.dev/api
programmatic `dev()`/`build()`/`preview()`/`prerender()`, vikeConfig/viteConfig options, access globalContext

## FAQ - https://vike.dev/faq
getting help (Discord/GitHub), business inquiries, contributing, cryptic JS errors, CSS leaking across pages, many HTTP requests in dev

# Deployment

## Deployment overview - https://vike.dev/deploy
pre-render to a static host, or run a production server

## Cloudflare Workers - https://vike.dev/cloudflare
@cloudflare/vite-plugin, `+server`, wrangler config, Cloudflare APIs, Durable Objects, extend 3MB limit, dev runtime (workerd), universal fetch()

## Cloudflare Pages - https://vike.dev/cloudflare-pages
being deprecated (prefer Workers), static/SSG hosting, manual integration

## Vercel - https://vike.dev/vercel
vite-plugin-vercel, `+server`, CLI/Git deploy, ISR, Edge, Build Output API, API routes

## AWS (self-hosted) - https://vike.dev/aws
full-stack deploy tools (SST / Flightcontrol / Argonaut), AWS Lambda

## AWS Lambda - https://vike.dev/aws-lambda
deploy to AWS Lambda (see /aws)

## Netlify - https://vike.dev/netlify
static/SSG hosting (SSR → /netlify-functions)

## Netlify Functions - https://vike.dev/netlify-functions
deploy SSR to Netlify Functions, examples

## Docker - https://vike.dev/docker
run as a Node.js container; dev HMR not working, can't access app, build out-of-memory

## GitHub Pages - https://vike.dev/github-pages
GitHub Pages Deploy Action, `.nojekyll`

## Static hosts - https://vike.dev/static-hosts
generic static hosting for pre-rendered (SSG) apps

## EdgeOne Pages - https://vike.dev/edgeone-pages
Tencent platform with SSR & HTML streaming, Vite adapter, Git/CLI deploy

# Config settings (knobs)

## +title - https://vike.dev/title
set the `<title>` tag, static or dynamic (function/useConfig)

## +description - https://vike.dev/description
set `<meta name="description">` (SEO)

## +image - https://vike.dev/image
set `<meta property="og:image">` (preview image on URL sharing)

## +viewport - https://vike.dev/viewport
mobile viewport width, responsive vs zoomed-out

## +htmlAttributes - https://vike.dev/htmlAttributes
attributes on the `<html>` tag (cumulative/global; for `lang` see /lang)

## +bodyAttributes - https://vike.dev/bodyAttributes
attributes on the `<body>` tag (cumulative/global)

## +redirects - https://vike.dev/redirects
static redirect map (Record<string,string>), aliases, pre-rendering, client navigation, vs throw redirect()

## +keepScrollPosition - https://vike.dev/keepScrollPosition
prevent scroll-to-top on navigation (nested layouts/tabs), per-link override

## +prefetchStaticAssets - https://vike.dev/prefetchStaticAssets
prefetch strategy `'hover'`|`'viewport'`|`false`, per-link override, different mobile/desktop

## +hooksTimeout - https://vike.dev/hooksTimeout
configure or disable per-hook timeouts

## +passToClient - https://vike.dev/passToClient
expose pageContext/globalContext props to the client, serialization, escaping `.`

## +headersResponse - https://vike.dev/headersResponse
set HTTP response headers statically or dynamically via pageContext.headersResponse

## +csp - https://vike.dev/csp
Content Security Policy nonce, pageContext.cspNonce, random per request, PCI, default CSP header
